title: gentianopsis crinita subsp. procera
intro: Gentianopsis crinita subsp. procera, also known as the tall fringed gentian, is a perennial plant species belonging to the gentian family and is native to North America. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Gentianopsis crinita subsp. procera include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as fever and digestive issues.
